projectDescription: An open-source stealer logs parser and visualization dashboard that automatically ingests ZIP log files, structures the data, and presents credentials, device information, and domain intelligence through a searchable web interface.
keyFeatures: Drag-and-drop ZIP stealer log ingestion with real-time progress tracking
Advanced credential search with AND/OR/NOT boolean operators
Device detail view with OS, hardware, credentials, software, and file tree
Asset discovery for subdomains, paths, and exposed credentials per domain
Statistical dashboard with country heatmap and browser/software analytics
Domain monitoring with webhook alerts (Slack, custom APIs)
S3-compatible object storage support (AWS S3, MinIO)
REST API v1 with API-key authentication for programmatic access
Role-based access control with Admin and Analyst roles
ClickHouse analytics backend with real-time MySQL replication for fast queries
publicApiSurface: POST /api/v1/upload — Upload a stealer log ZIP file (admin keys only); returns jobId
GET /api/v1/upload/status/{jobId} — Poll async upload job status and progress
POST /api/v1/search/credentials — Search credentials by email, username, or password
GET /api/v1/search/domain — Search subdomains, paths, and credentials for a domain
GET /api/v1/lookup — Lookup endpoint for device/credential correlation
